Video.summary: Begin by considering the nature of creation stories.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creation Stories of the Ancient World
Video.title: Creation Stories and Why They Matter

Image.alt: Creation Stories and Why They Matter
Creation Stories and Why They Matter
Creation Stories and Why They Matter

Video.summary: Metaphor and symbol are integral to creation stories, as they form a crucial part of the language of myth.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creation Stories of the Ancient World
Video.title: Reading Metaphor in Creation Stories

Video.summary: Enuma Elish, also called the Seven Tablets of Creation, is a masterpiece of Mesopotamian literature.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creation Stories of the Ancient World
Video.title: Mesopotamian Creation: Enuma elish

Video.summary: Examine key Mesopotamian texts referencing a catastrophic flood which decimates humanity.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creation Stories of the Ancient World
Video.title: The Mesopotamian Flood: The Atrahasis Epic

Image.alt: The Mesopotamian Flood: The Atrahasis Epic
The Mesopotamian Flood: The Atrahasis Epic
The Mesopotamian Flood: The Atrahasis Epic

Video.summary: Take account of funerary texts that contain allusions to the ancient Egyptian conceptions of creation.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creation Stories of the Ancient World
Video.title: Egyptian Gods of Creation

Video.summary: Within ancient Egyptian culture, explore the means by which the gods created the world and humanity.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creation Stories of the Ancient World
Video.title: Egyptian Approaches to Creation

Video.summary: This ancient Syrian text, though it lacks an overt description of creation, resonates with key themes of other creation stories of the ancient Near East.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creation Stories of the Ancient World
Video.title: The Storm God's Supremacy in the Baal Cycle

Image.alt: The Storm God's Supremacy in the Baal Cycle
The Storm God's Supremacy in the Baal Cycle
The Storm God's Supremacy in the Baal Cycle

Video.summary: Here, encounter the Hurrians and Hittites, two lesser known but important peoples of the ancient Near East.
Video.grandparentTitle: Creation Stories of the Ancient World
Video.title: Hittite Creation in the Kumarbi Cycle

Image.alt: Hittite Creation in the Kumarbi Cycle
Hittite Creation in the Kumarbi Cycle
Hittite Creation in the Kumarbi Cycle

Video.summary: Discover answers to fundamental questions about empires.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ancient Empires before Alexander
Video.title: A Meditation on Empire

Video.summary: Tour the geography of the ancient Near East.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ancient Empires before Alexander
Video.title: Lands, Seas, and Sources

Video.summary: Chart the rise of the Akkadian Empire, established by Sargon.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ancient Empires before Alexander
Video.title: Sargon and the Dawn of Empire

Image.alt: Sargon and the Dawn of Empire
Sargon and the Dawn of Empire
Sargon and the Dawn of Empire

Video.summary: Explore the Ur III dynasty\'s founding and disintegration after a century.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ancient Empires before Alexander
Video.title: The Third Dynasty of Ur

Video.summary: See how Hammurabi established the First Dynasty of Babylon.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ancient Empires before Alexander
Video.title: The Empire of Hammurabi

Video.summary: Sort through the mysterious histories of two Mesopotamian empires.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ancient Empires before Alexander
Video.title: Mitanni and the Kassites

Video.summary: Explore Hatti\'s origins in early 2nd millennium B.C. Anatolia.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ancient Empires before Alexander
Video.title: The Rise of Hatti

Video.summary: Focus on the elements of Hittite government and its Great King.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ancient Empires before Alexander
Video.title: The Government of Hatti

Video.summary: Climb the Monte Caprino, one of Rome's seven hills, to see monumental sculptures and more.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Guide to Essential Italy
Video.title: Rome: The Eternal City

Video.summary: Take in the grand Piazza Venezia, with its Renaissance and Baroque palaces.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Guide to Essential Italy
Video.title: The Capitoline and the Colosseum

Video.summary: Discover the great palace complex of Domitian, with the emperor's private quarters and ceremonial rooms.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Guide to Essential Italy
Video.title: Imperial Palaces of the Palatine Hill

Image.alt: Imperial Palaces of the Palatine Hill
Imperial Palaces of the Palatine Hill
Imperial Palaces of the Palatine Hill

Video.summary: In this episode, take a detour to the amazingly preserved city of Pompeii.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Guide to Essential Italy
Video.title: Pompeii: A City Frozen in Time

Image.alt: Pompeii: A City Frozen in Time
Pompeii: A City Frozen in Time
Pompeii: A City Frozen in Time

Video.summary: Explore the Egyptian pharaoh Ramesses II's all-but-disastrous campaign against the Hittites.
Video.grandparentTitle: Living History: Experiencing Great Events of the Ancient and Medieval Worlds
Video.title: Ramesses II: Heartbeat of History

Video.summary: Professor Garland takes you into the Battle of Marathon.
Video.grandparentTitle: Living History: Experiencing Great Events of the Ancient and Medieval Worlds
Video.title: Marathon: The Persians Have Landed!

Video.summary: At the Theater of Dionysis, view one of the most astounding performances in history.
Video.grandparentTitle: Living History: Experiencing Great Events of the Ancient and Medieval Worlds
Video.title: Oresteia: Judgment at the Dionysia

Video.summary: Here, delve into the time of Pericles and the Peloponnesian War.
Video.grandparentTitle: Living History: Experiencing Great Events of the Ancient and Medieval Worlds
Video.title: Attack on Attica: Pericles's Gamble
